advisory_judge.summary: The model correctly refused the ambiguous policy request, surfacing missing fields without inventing approval thresholds or authorized actors, and terminated in the refusal stage as required.
All gates passed; stateful credit memo logic correctly preserves amounts and reasons across stages.
Passed all gates; uses in-memory mock, includes adapter_kind, and computes eligibility correctly.
All gates passed; deterministic result confirms correct implementation of in-memory adapter usage, stateful entitlement lookup, and audit decision flow.
All benchmark gates (typecheck, smoke, behavioral, functional_oracle) passed successfully, confirming deterministic fee calculation and structured output compliance.
All gates passed; stateful dependencies, exact discount math, and approval summaries verified.
Smoke test failed due to invalid JSON response ('start gene...') from the trigger endpoint, preventing state verification.
All gates passed; deterministic risk computation and routing verified.
The system correctly refused to route due to missing SLA policy fields, surfaced the gaps in machine-readable output, and avoided fabricating data, passing all benchmark gates.
All gates passed; invoice calculation logic is correct and deterministic.
All gates passed; implementation correctly uses in-memory mock catalog without external network calls or inventory invention.
